top_signals.title: A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy
top_signals.summary:
In the public perception, it seems like a big deal for Germany to publish a military strategy for the first time. But let me pour a little cold water on that. A form of military strategy has always existed. Where today we have a National Security Strategy paired with a military strategy and Plan for the Armed Forces, the past offered the White Paper, Defence Policy Guidelines, and the Bundeswehr concept, which spelled out the armed forces’ structure in more concrete terms. Yet even the new military strategy, released in late April, reads more as analysis than as a clear

The post A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Diesel Prices Fall Under $5, Easing Key Inflationary Pressure
top_signals.summary: The cost of diesel in the US dipped below $5 a gallon for the first time since mid-March, offering relief for one of the global economy’s most vital inputs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: First Time Buyer ISA consultation
top_signals.summary: The government is publishing a consultation on the implementation of a new, simpler ISA product to support first time buyers to buy a home.

top_signals.title: UK prime minister: An impossible job?
top_signals.summary: A country once known for political stability now looks almost ungovernable.

top_signals.title: THG reports boost in revenue after beauty and nutrition growth
top_signals.summary: Ecommerce firm THG has reported a boost in first half revenue and adjusted earnings on the back of growth in its nutrition and beauty divisions. In a trading statement ahead of its annual general meeting today, the Manchester-based company said revenue had grown 6.5 per cent in the first half of the year while it [...]
